mapper.update: UPDATE rt_table_stats SET today_idv = today_idv + #{insertVolume}, today_udv = today_udv + #{updateVolume}, today_ddv = today_ddv + #{deleteVolume}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE rt_table_stats SET last_idv = last_idv + today_idv, last_udv = last_udv + today_udv, last_ddv = last_ddv + today_ddv, today_idv = 0, today_udv = 0, today_ddv = 0, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE rt_table_stats SET last_idv = last_idv + today_idv, last_udv = last_udv + today_udv, last_ddv = last_ddv + today_ddv, today_idv = 0, today_udv = 0, today_ddv = 0, updated_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT (last_idv + today_idv) as totalInsert, (last_udv + today_udv) as totalUpdate, (last_ddv + today_ddv) as totalDelete, (last_idv + today_idv + last_udv + today_udv + last_ddv + today_ddv) as totalVolume FROM rt_table_stats WHERE id = #{id}
